videos.headline: Quali Conley punches in an Arizona TD
videos.description: Quali Conley barrels into the end zone to cut the Texas Tech's lead down to two points.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quali Conley punches in an Arizona TD) 2024/10/06 ESHEET
